title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at VMware India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? VMware India Advisory Limited in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
